name: Finastra FusionFabric.cloud API
what_it_does: Finastra FusionFabric.cloud REST API marketplace for banking and financial services platform. Enables AI agents to manage corporate banking and trade finance workflow automation, handle retail banking account and transaction data access, access FusionBanker and FusionInvestor core banking integrations, retrieve payments processing and SWIFT messaging data, manage lending origination and servicing lifecycle automation, handle treasury and capital markets workflow data, access compliance and regulatory reporting data, retrieve open banking and PSD2-compliant data, manage FusionCredit and FusionLend lending automation, and integrate Finastra banking applications with fintech ecosystem and third-party services.
use_cases: Automating trade finance workflows from corporate banking agents
Managing retail account operations from digital banking agents
Processing payments and SWIFT messages from treasury agents
Integrating lending workflows with origination from lending automation agents
not_for: Consumer fintech without enterprise bank licensing or partnership
Simple payment processing without core banking integration requirements
Cloud-native fintech without legacy banking system integration needs
best_when: A bank or financial institution using Finastra products wants AI agents to automate banking workflows, trade finance processing, lending lifecycle, treasury operations, and open banking integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL+REGULATORY RISK: Banking workflow automation requires regulatory compliance per jurisdiction — automated transaction processing, credit decisions, and account actions must comply with applicable banking regulations. SWIFT messaging automation requires proper message validation and compliance screening before routing.

auth.notes: FusionFabric.cloud uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials and authorization code flows. Finastra Developer Studio for app registration. Scope-based access control per banking application domain. Webhooks for transaction and lifecycle event notifications. OpenAPI specifications for all published APIs. FusionFabric marketplace for approved fintech integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox access free for developers; production requires Finastra bank customer relationship
pricing.paid_tiers: FusionFabric platform pricing through bank licensing agreements; API marketplace revenue share for fintech apps
pricing.notes: London, United Kingdom. Finastra (Vista Equity Partners + Misys + D+H merger). Founded 2017. Private ($10B+ valuation). Banking software market #3 globally ($2B+ revenue). 8,500+ financial institutions. 48 of top 50 global banks use Finastra products. FusionFabric.cloud open banking marketplace. Strong corporate banking and trade finance. Competes with Temenos for banking software.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; banking application-specific limits vary

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL+REGULATORY RISK: Banking transaction automation must comply with applicable regulations; SWIFT messages require compliance screening before routing
FusionFabric marketplace access — production API access requires bank customer relationship; not a self-serve API platform
Multiple banking products — FusionBanker, FusionTrade, FusionLend, etc. have separate API surfaces; understand product landscape before automating
OpenAPI spec quality varies — newer APIs have better OpenAPI specs; legacy APIs may have less complete documentation
Bank approval required — fintech apps on FusionFabric marketplace require both Finastra and bank customer approval
SWIFT messaging — automated SWIFT message generation requires deep knowledge of SWIFT standards; validate messages before production routing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Banking platform. SOC2, ISO27001, PSD2, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Core banking and financial transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Banking platform. SOC2, ISO27001, PSD2. OAuth2. Multi-region. Core banking and financial data.
